claim_boundary: technical harmonization only; no ranking, causal claim, forecast, policy claim, electoral inference or personal inference

entries.transformation_applied: unit_alias_only; raw values preserved; negative polarity can be sign-inverted only for technical scoring

entries.transformation_applied: annual arithmetic mean from 12 official monthly ENOE percentage observations per year; raw monthly workbook preserved by SHA256
evidence: INEGI ENOE workbook enoe_indicadores_estrategicos_2005_2026_mensual.xlsx in source intake raw folder
Fixture inegi_mexico_social_2018_2023_fixture.json includes annual means from sheet 1.2 row 289
Same broad unemployment-rate domain as World Bank SL.UEM.TOTL.ZS and Eurostat une_rt_a
caveats: INEGI ENOE is survey-derived and is not an EXACT semantic match to provider-modelled or Eurostat unemployment definitions.
2020-2022 carry ENOE/ETOE/ENOE_N continuity caveats from the source workbook.
This class does not permit ranking Mexico, Germany, providers or sources.

entries.transformation_applied: raw percent growth preserved; semantic equivalence held for review

caveats: GDP per capita growth is not the same semantic unit as aggregate real GDP volume growth.
Use only as economic-growth REVIEW until a stricter harmonization rule exists.
